reasoning: The market is currently pricing this event at 87.5% following the April 10, 2026 release of the March 2026 CPI report. The report indicated a massive 0.9% month-over-month increase in CPI-U, largely driven by gasoline, bringing the 12-month unadjusted increase to 3.3%. While this is still below the strictly greater than 3.5% (i.e. 3.6% or higher) threshold required for a 'Yes' resolution, the high momentum of a 0.9% monthly jump means that rolling off a smaller base effect in an upcoming month is highly likely to push the YoY figure over 3.5% before the end of the year. Market prices strongly support an 85-90% probability of reaching the threshold in the remaining 9 months. I've slightly moderated to 87.5% based on PM, widening slightly toward 0.5 for subsequent synthetic horizon targets.
